summary: Iteration 61: Admin Dashboard Full Functionality Test - All 23 backend tests PASSED, all UI tests PASSED. Comprehensive testing of admin login, dashboard stats, pipeline kanban, analytics (6 tabs), WhatsApp (4 tabs), leads CRM, and products management.

issues: Cookie consent banner appears on admin pages - minor UX issue but functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin dashboard features fully functional. Dashboard shows 810 products, 46 leads (18 hot, 14 warm, 14 cold, 30 new). Pipeline has 6 kanban columns with drag-drop. Analytics has 6 tabs (CRM Leads, Territory, Hospitals, Competitive Intel, Search Intelligence, WhatsApp). WhatsApp page has 4 tabs (Inbox with 13 conversations, Templates, Analytics, Contact Sync). Products page shows 1202 products with search/filter.

admin_login.details: Login with password AgileHealth2026admin works, redirects to dashboard

dashboard_stats.details: Shows 810 products, 46 leads, 18 hot, 14 warm, 14 cold, 30 new leads. Products by Division and Leads by Inquiry Type charts working.

pipeline_kanban.details: 6 columns (new:30, contacted:10, qualified:2, negotiation:2, won:1, lost:1). Lead cards show score badges, source tags, contact icons. Drag instruction visible.

analytics_crm_leads_tab.details: Shows funnel chart, score distribution (7 Hot, 6 Warm, 8 Cold), leads by source, top districts, leads by inquiry type

analytics_territory_tab.details: Shows 4 zones (1,891 accounts, 1,141 hospitals), zone filter, zone cards with penetration data, district penetration table

analytics_hospitals_tab.details: Shows 19 hospitals, upsell opportunities, engagement depth (0 deep, 1 moderate, 18 single)

analytics_competitive_intel_tab.details: Tracking 24 competitor brands (Abbott, Arthrex, B. Braun, etc.), competitor ranking, division threat map

analytics_search_intelligence_tab.details: 57 queries, 52 sessions, 19ms avg response, 8.8% off-topic rate, confidence breakdown, top doctor queries, unmatched searches

analytics_whatsapp_tab.details: 13 conversations, 10 AI active, 59 messages, delivery stats, nurture sequences (22 scheduled, 7 pending)

whatsapp_inbox_tab.details: Shows 13 conversations with AI Bot status, customer names, last messages, timestamps

whatsapp_conversation_view.details: MessageBubble rendering works - customer messages in white, AI bot messages in green. Take Over button, reply input visible.

whatsapp_templates_tab.details: Send template form with phone select/input, template name, language, body variables fields

whatsapp_analytics_tab.details: Conversation stats, campaign delivery (2 events, 1 delivered, 1 read), message delivery stats (33.3% delivery rate, 25% read rate)

whatsapp_contact_sync_tab.details: Bulk Sync All Leads button present with explanation text

leads_page.details: 46 total leads, search/filter working, table with name, hospital, contact, score badges, status dropdown, view/delete actions

products_page.details: 1202 products, search/division filter, Extract from Brochures, Bulk Images, Add Product buttons. Table with product, SKU, division, category, images, status, actions.
